# Horizon Dubai Property

> Premium Dubai real estate for international investors. Freehold ownership, Golden Visa assistance, zero income tax. AI-powered property matching.

## About

Horizon Dubai Property is a Dubai-based real estate agency serving international buyers. Part of the Horizon Property AI platform founded by Aleksandr Doronin (CEO, Blockchain Industrial Alliance). Marina is the on-ground property consultant in Dubai.

### Key Differentiators
- AI-powered property discovery across Dubai's market
- RERA-verified listings with DLD title deed confirmation
- Golden Visa end-to-end assistance (AED 2M+ properties)
- Zero income tax, zero capital gains tax
- Freehold ownership for all nationalities

## Services
- Property sales: apartments, villas, penthouses, townhouses (ready and off-plan)
- Golden Visa processing through property investment
- Off-plan investment with RERA escrow protection
- Mortgage assistance for non-residents
- Property management and rental services

## Areas Covered
Dubai Marina, Downtown Dubai, Palm Jumeirah, Business Bay, JVC, Dubai Hills, JBR, Dubai South, Emaar Beachfront, Creek Harbour, MBR City

## Key Pages
- /properties/ — Verified property listings with filters
- /golden-visa/ — Golden Visa guide: requirements, process, costs
- /off-plan/ — Off-plan buying guide with developer due diligence
- /guides/ — All buying and investment guides
- /faq/ — 12 frequently asked questions
- /blog/ — Market analysis and area guides
- /about/ — Team and company info
- /contact/ — Enquiry form, WhatsApp, Telegram

## Market Data (2026)
| Area | Price Range | Yield | Type |
|------|------------|-------|------|
| Dubai Marina | $300K-$2M+ | 5-7% | Apartments |
| Downtown Dubai | $400K-$3M+ | 4-6% | Apartments |
| Palm Jumeirah | $500K-$10M+ | 4-5% | Villas, Apartments |
| Business Bay | $250K-$1.5M | 6-7% | Apartments |
| JVC | $150K-$500K | 7-8% | Apartments |
| Dubai Hills | $300K-$2M | 5-7% | Villas, Apartments |
